content:
### Strategy

| Layer | Mechanism | Location |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| Fixture conformance | `.py` fixture + `.expected` golden file, run via `conformance_tests.rs` harness | `tests/fixtures/conformance/generators/`, `tests/fixtures/conformance/iterators/` |
| Golden generation | Run each `.py` under CPython 3.12, capture stdout to `.expected` | manual or `regen_golden.py` |
| Regression guard | All 6 existing generator/iterator fixtures must continue to pass | inline |

All tests run through the full JIT pipeline: parse → type-check → HIR → MIR → Cranelift JIT → capture stdout → compare against `.expected`.

### T1: Generator expressions (R1)

**Fixture**: `generators/genexpr.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T1.1 | `list(x**2 for x in range(5))` | `[0, 1, 4, 9, 16]` |
| T1.2 | `list(x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0)` | `[0, 2, 4, 6, 8]` |
| T1.3 | `sum(x for x in range(4))` | `6` |
| T1.4 | `list((x, y) for x in range(3) for y in range(2))` | `[(0, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (1, 1), (2, 0), (2, 1)]` |
| T1.5 | `max(x**2 for x in range(-3, 4))` | `9` |
| T1.6 | `min(abs(x) for x in [-5, 3, -1, 4])` | `1` |

### T2: Generator send edge cases (R2)

**Fixture**: `generators/send_edge_cases.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T2.1 | `g.send(None)` on unstarted generator | same as `next(g)` — returns first yielded value |
| T2.2 | `g.send(42)` on unstarted generator | `TypeError` raised |
| T2.3 | `g.send(1)` on exhausted generator | `StopIteration` raised |
| T2.4 | `send(value)` returns next yielded value | yielded value matches CPython |

### T3: Generator throw edge cases (R3)

**Fixture**: `generators/throw_edge_cases.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T3.1 | throw TypeError with no matching except | TypeError propagates to caller |
| T3.2 | throw into finally block | finally executes, exception propagates |
| T3.3 | throw on exhausted generator | exception raised immediately |
| T3.4 | throw exception caught by generator | generator continues from except handler |

### T4: Generator close edge cases (R4)

**Fixture**: `generators/close_edge_cases.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T4.1 | close() on unstarted generator | silent no-op |
| T4.2 | close() on exhausted generator | silent no-op |
| T4.3 | close() triggers GeneratorExit | generator's except GeneratorExit runs |
| T4.4 | generator ignores GeneratorExit (yields again) | `RuntimeError` raised |
| T4.5 | close() triggers finally block | finally block executes |

### T5: yield from send/throw passthrough (R5)

**Fixture**: `generators/yield_from_passthrough.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T5.1 | send(value) through yield-from to inner | inner receives sent value |
| T5.2 | throw(exc) through yield-from to inner | inner's except handler catches |
| T5.3 | inner return value captured by outer | outer receives StopIteration.value |
| T5.4 | close() through yield-from to inner | inner receives GeneratorExit |

### T6: Generator state attributes (R6)

**Fixture**: `generators/state_attributes.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T6.1 | `gi_frame` before first next() | not None |
| T6.2 | `gi_frame` after suspend | not None |
| T6.3 | `gi_frame` after exhaustion | None |
| T6.4 | `gi_frame` after close() | None |

### T7: Custom iterator class (R7)

**Fixture**: `iterators/custom_iterator.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T7.1 | for loop over custom iterator | all values yielded in order |
| T7.2 | list() on custom iterator | list of all values |
| T7.3 | next() with StopIteration | StopIteration raised when exhausted |
| T7.4 | `in` operator on custom iterator | True for present, False for absent |
| T7.5 | unpacking from custom iterator | values assigned correctly |

### T8: Iterator composition with generators (R8)

**Fixture**: `iterators/composition.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T8.1 | `enumerate(gen())` | `[(0, v0), (1, v1), ...]` |
| T8.2 | `zip(gen1(), gen2())` | pairs until shorter exhausted |
| T8.3 | `map(fn, gen())` | mapped values |
| T8.4 | `filter(fn, gen())` | filtered values |
| T8.5 | chained `enumerate(filter(pred, map(fn, gen())))` | composed result |

### T9: iter(callable, sentinel) (R9)

**Fixture**: `iterators/callable_sentinel.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T9.1 | iter(fn, sentinel) stops at sentinel | values before sentinel |
| T9.2 | iter(fn, sentinel) with no match | exhausts callable (or TypeError) |

### T10: Generator-based context manager (R10)

**Fixture**: `generators/context_manager_pattern.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T10.1 | try/yield/finally — normal path | acquire → body → release |
| T10.2 | try/yield/finally — exception in body | acquire → exception → release (finally runs) |

### T11: Generator lifecycle (R11)

**Fixture**: `generators/lifecycle.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T11.1 | del on active generator | close() called, finally runs |
| T11.2 | close() on generator with pending finally | finally executes |

### T12: Iterable unpacking with generators (R12)

**Fixture**: `iterators/unpacking.py`

| TC | Input | Expected |
|----|-------|----------|
| T12.1 | `a, b, c = gen()` | correct assignment |
| T12.2 | `first, *rest = gen()` | first + rest list |
| T12.3 | `a, *mid, last = gen()` | first + middle list + last |
| T12.4 | `a, b, c = gen()` with 2 values | ValueError |
| T12.5 | `a, b = gen()` with 3 values | ValueError |

### Traceability

| Test | Requirement | Scenarios | Fixture |
|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
| T1.1-T1.6 | R1 | S1, S2, S3 | `genexpr.py` |
| T2.1-T2.4 | R2 | S4, S5 | `send_edge_cases.py` |
| T3.1-T3.4 | R3 | S6, S7, S8 | `throw_edge_cases.py` |
| T4.1-T4.5 | R4 | S9, S10 | `close_edge_cases.py` |
| T5.1-T5.4 | R5 | S11, S12, S13 | `yield_from_passthrough.py` |
| T6.1-T6.4 | R6 | S14 | `state_attributes.py` |
| T7.1-T7.5 | R7 | S15, S16 | `custom_iterator.py` |
| T8.1-T8.5 | R8 | S17, S18, S19 | `composition.py` |
| T9.1-T9.2 | R9 | S20 | `callable_sentinel.py` |
| T10.1-T10.2 | R10 | S21 | `context_manager_pattern.py` |
| T11.1-T11.2 | R11 | S22, S23 | `lifecycle.py` |
| T12.1-T12.5 | R12 | S24, S25 | `unpacking.py` |

### Regression

- All 4 existing `generators/*.py` fixtures (basic_yield, send_throw, stopiteration, yield_from) must continue to pass unchanged
- Existing `iterators/protocol.py` fixture must continue to pass unchanged
- Existing `language/generators.py` fixture must continue to pass unchanged
- Existing `builtins/iteration.py` fixture must continue to pass unchanged
